ab: Adasun azam tataqu munha’an patismumuutan haip diqanin, iha’an azam ukumbu’an masindailaz mabaliv is kipu’.
ch: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: Mukumbu’in azam is patismumuutan a, tupa ca tataqu tu “luqai’ ca ha’an tantangaus, ivut ca ha’an hiku’, ananaka saduu.”
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說:「前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: Mapising azak is ivut, daqat nii’ azak saduus ivutivut.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: Madia’ sala ca luqai’ sadu’anku, idaza’ a nais lukic kusbabai, saduu azak amin tucqu’ ikumbu’ is huqtung masabaq.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: Maiza ca cuu’, tancikis, ciin huqnavdaing iha’an patismumuutan, mii’ang azak qabas sinaduus tismumuut mangki’, sinaduun azak haip a manahip sala ca is’ang.
ch: 動物園裡有大象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: Madia’ sala ca siniza’ inaak a qaningu, iscaiv it tamatina pasaduu nai.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: Na muskun azak it tamatina maipa ti’ maca muqnin.
ch: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
